notes: MFCC mean+std (n_mfcc=40, sr=48000), k=3. Baseline floor for Phase 4 comparison.
HOG + color hist features, C=10.0 rbf. Baseline floor for Phase 4 comparison.
_build_audio_cnn, 30 epochs, weighted CE loss, Adam lr=1e-3. Underperforms KNN — insufficient data for CNN from scratch.
BirdNET global model, no fine-tuning, min_conf=0.1, matched on scientific_name. resampy installed, 66/86 files detected.
EfficientNet-B0 timm, phase A 10ep head-only lr=1e-3, phase B 15ep full lr=1e-4. Overfits — insufficient data for full fine-tuning.
timm efficientnet_b0 pretrained=True frozen, LogReg C=0.1, StandardScaler. ImageNet features transfer well to bird species.
PyTorch CPU forward pass, mean=82.60ms. Backbone only (no LogReg head). Reference for Hailo comparison.
Pre-compiled ResNet-50 HEF, default VDevice (no ROUND_ROBIN). mean=0.25ms. Establishes raw NPU throughput upper bound.
Our trained frozen_extractor.pt compiled via DFC 3.32.0 to HEF. ROUND_ROBIN scheduler required. mean=13.04ms = 6.3x speedup vs CPU. Calibrated on 64 real SD bird images.
